title: Nano Chat
excerpt: Local in-browser mini LLM chat for this site. Model runs in your browser (no server endpoint).

title: Sample Post with Syntax Highlighting
excerpt: This is a sample post that demonstrates the syntax highlighting capabilities of the Metacritical theme for Alchemist.

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Modes & Extensibility) - Part 11

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Undo/Redo & Command Log) - Part 10

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Syntax Highlighting) - Part 9

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Search & Replace) - Part 8

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Rendering & Redisplay) - Part 7

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Keymaps & Input Handling) - Part 6

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Terminal I/O & Raw Mode) - Part 5
excerpt: In Part 4 we built a line management layer and a viewport renderer. But that renderer only returns strings — it never actually paints anything on a screen. To turn those strings into an interactive display, we have to...

title: Writing a Programmers Editor (Lines & Display) - Part 4
excerpt: In Part 3 we built a gap buffer in Scheme. It can hold text, insert characters, delete them, move the cursor, and resize when the gap runs out. It is about 80 lines of code and it works.
